mapper.select:
SELECT ts.seq AS timeSlotSeq, ts.name AS slotName, ts.days_of_week AS daysOfWeek, ts.start_time AS startTime, ts.end_time AS endTime, c.seq AS classSeq, c.name AS className, c.capacity AS capacity, m.seq AS memberSeq, m.name AS name, m.phone_number AS phoneNumber, CASE WHEN si.seq IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS staff, CASE WHEN pr.seq IS NOT NULL AND si.seq IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS postponed,
CASE WHEN si.seq IS NULL AND mm.seq IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS noMembership, CASE WHEN pr.seq IS NOT NULL AND si.seq IS NULL THEN '△' WHEN a.status = '출석' THEN 'O' WHEN a.status = '결석' THEN 'X' ELSE '' END AS status, a.attendance_date AS attendanceDate FROM complex_classes c JOIN class_time_slots ts ON ts.seq = c.time_slot_seq LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c2.seq AS class_seq, c2.staff_seq AS member_seq, -1 AS sort_order FROM complex_classes c2 WHERE c2.staff_seq IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT mcm.class_seq, mcm.member_seq, mcm.sort_order FROM complex_member_class_mapping mcm ) cm ON cm.class_seq = c.seq LEFT JOIN complex_members m ON m.seq = cm.member_seq LEFT JOIN complex_staff_info si ON si.member_seq = m.seq
LEFT JOIN complex_member_memberships mm ON mm.member_seq = m.seq AND mm.status = '활성' AND mm.internal = FALSE AND (mm.expiry_date IS NULL OR mm.expiry_date >= #{today}) AND (mm.total_count IS NULL OR mm.used_count < mm.total_count) LEFT JOIN complex_postponement_requests pr ON pr.member_membership_seq = mm.seq AND pr.status = '승인' AND #{today} BETWEEN pr.start_date AND pr.end_date
LEFT JOIN complex_member_attendance a ON a.seq = ( SELECT a2.seq FROM complex_member_attendance a2 WHERE a2.member_seq = m.seq AND a2.class_seq = c.seq AND a2.attendance_date >= DATE_SUB(#{today}, INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND a2.attendance_date <= #{today} ORDER BY a2.attendance_date DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} ORDER BY ts.seq, c.sort_order, staff DESC, cm.sort_order, m.name

SELECT c.seq AS classSeq, c.name AS className, c.capacity AS capacity, m.seq AS memberSeq, m.name AS name, m.phone_number AS phoneNumber, CASE WHEN si.seq IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS staff, CASE WHEN pr.seq IS NOT NULL AND si.seq IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS postponed, CASE WHEN si.seq IS NULL AND mm.seq IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS noMembership, CASE WHEN pr.seq IS NOT NULL AND si.seq IS NULL THEN '△' ELSE '' END AS status, md.level AS level, m.info AS info, mm.start_date AS joinDate, mm.expiry_date AS expiryDate, mm.total_count AS totalCount, mm.used_count AS usedCount, ms.name AS membershipName FROM complex_classes c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c2.seq AS class_seq, c2.staff_seq AS member_seq, -1 AS sort_order FROM complex_classes c2 WHERE c2.staff_seq IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT mcm.class_seq, mcm.member_seq, mcm.sort_order FROM complex_member_class_mapping mcm ) cm ON cm.class_seq = c.seq LEFT JOIN complex_members m ON m.seq = cm.member_seq LEFT JOIN complex_staff_info si ON si.member_seq = m.seq LEFT JOIN complex_member_metadata md ON md.member_seq = m.seq
LEFT JOIN complex_member_memberships mm ON mm.member_seq = m.seq AND mm.status = '활성' AND mm.internal = FALSE LEFT JOIN complex_postponement_requests pr ON pr.member_membership_seq = mm.seq AND pr.status = '승인' AND #{today} BETWEEN pr.start_date AND pr.end_date LEFT JOIN memberships ms ON ms.seq = mm.membership_seq WHERE c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND c.time_slot_seq = #{slotSeq} ORDER BY c.sort_order, staff DESC, cm.sort_order, m.name

SELECT sub.classSeq, sub.memberSeq, sub.status FROM ( SELECT a.class_seq AS classSeq, a.member_seq AS memberSeq, CASE a.status WHEN '출석' THEN 'O' WHEN '연기' THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END AS status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY a.class_seq, a.member_seq ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC ) AS rn FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq WHERE c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND c.time_slot_seq = #{slotSeq} ) sub WHERE sub.rn <= 14 ORDER BY sub.classSeq, sub.memberSeq, sub.rn

SELECT a.seq AS seq, a.attendance_date AS attendanceDate, a.status AS status, c.name AS className, a.note AS note FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq WHERE a.member_seq = #{memberSeq} AND c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC, c.name LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT a.seq AS seq, a.attendance_date AS attendanceDate, a.status AS status, c.name AS className, a.note AS note FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq WHERE a.member_seq = #{staffSeq} AND c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC, c.name LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '출석' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS presentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '결석' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '연기' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS postponeCount, MIN(a.attendance_date) AS startDate, MAX(a.attendance_date) AS endDate FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq WHERE a.member_seq = #{memberSeq} AND c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '출석' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS presentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '결석' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '연기' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS postponeCount, MIN(a.attendance_date) AS startDate, MAX(a.attendance_date) AS endDate FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq WHERE a.member_seq = #{staffSeq} AND c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq}

SELECT a.member_seq AS staffSeq, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '출석' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS presentCount FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq JOIN complex_staff_info si ON si.member_seq = a.member_seq WHERE c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND a.attendance_date >= #{fromDate} GROUP BY a.member_seq
